metadata.description: ORTEX for Claude — the institutional short-selling and market-intelligence data desks pay for.

plugins.name: ortex
plugins.description: The institutional short-selling data desks pay for, inside Claude — short interest, cost-to-borrow, days-to-cover, utilisation and squeeze signals, plus options analytics, stock scores, fundamentals, prices and US Congressional trades. Ships with an analyst skill so Claude reads it like a securities-lending pro.
